creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 239742
Patch file

* Update to 1.8.0
* Copy from www/rubygem-webrick to www/rubygem-webrick17 before
  updating the former to 1.8.0.
* For all ports thats aren't compatible with webrick 1.8.0, update
  dependency about webrick from www/rubygem-webrick to
  www/rubygem-webrick17.

ChangeLog:      https://github.com/ruby/webrick/releases/tag/v1.8.0
